bio_zh: 米利都学派创始人,被誉为'哲学之父'。提出万物本源为水,以自然本身解释自然。
bio_en: Founder of the Milesian school, the 'father of philosophy'. Proposed water as the arche of all things.

quotes.zh: 万物起源于水,又复归于水。
quotes.en: All things arise from water and return to water.
quotes.source_zh: 据亚里士多德《形而上学》

quotes.zh: 水是最好的东西。
quotes.en: Water is the best of all things.

quotes.zh: 磁石有灵魂,因为它能移动铁。
quotes.en: The magnet has a soul, for it moves iron.

quotes.zh: 万物充满神。
quotes.en: All things are full of gods.

quotes.zh: 一切从地生长。
quotes.en: All things grow from earth.

counter_patterns: 神秘主义解释要追溯到物质本身
抽象推理应以可观察的自然现象为依据
rebuttal_style: 自然观察 + 单一本原归纳

bio_zh: 以'万物流变'著称,'人不能两次踏进同一条河流'。强调火与 logos 为宇宙根本法则。
bio_en: Known for flux: 'No man ever steps in the same river twice'. Stressed fire and *logos* as cosmic law.

quotes.zh: 人不能两次踏进同一条河流。
quotes.en: No man ever steps in the same river twice.

quotes.zh: 太阳每天都是新的。
quotes.en: The sun is new each day.

quotes.zh: 一切皆流,无物常住。
quotes.en: All things are in flux; nothing stays.

quotes.zh: 战争是万物之父。
quotes.en: War is the father of all things.

quotes.zh: 性格即命运。
quotes.en: Character is destiny.

quotes.zh: 逻各斯是永恒的法则,人常不能理解。
quotes.en: The *logos* is eternal; men fail to understand it.

quotes.zh: 驴宁愿要草料而不要黄金。
quotes.en: The ass would rather have straw than gold.

counter_patterns: 静态本体论是虚假的抽象
共识往往是错觉
对立是过程的本质

bio_zh: 主张'存在者存在,非存在者不存在'。通过纯逻辑推理论证存在是永恒、不动、不可分的。
bio_en: Argued 'what is, is; what is not, is not'. Demonstrated that Being is eternal, motionless, indivisible.

quotes.zh: 存在者存在,非存在者不存在。
quotes.en: What is, is; what is not, is not.

quotes.zh: 思维与存在是同一的。
quotes.en: Thinking and being are the same.

quotes.zh: 存在的界限是必然的。
quotes.en: The limits of being are necessity.

quotes.zh: 存在是连续的,不可分。
quotes.en: Being is continuous and indivisible.

quotes.zh: 存在是不生不灭的。
quotes.en: Being is ungenerated and indestructible.

core_theses: 存在者存在,非存在者不存在
counter_patterns: 变化是感觉的错觉
多与变是逻辑上不可能的
经验不是知识的来源
rebuttal_style: 逻辑演绎 + 反经验主义

bio_zh: 以悖论闻名:阿基里斯追不上乌龟、飞矢不动等。旨在用反证法维护存在的不动性。
bio_en: Famous for paradoxes: Achilles and the tortoise, the arrow, the stadium. Defended Being via *reductio*.

quotes.zh: 运动的东西既不在它所在的地方运动,也不在它所不在的地方运动。
quotes.en: What is in motion moves neither in the place where it is nor in the place where it is not.

quotes.zh: 阿基里斯永远追不上先行的乌龟。
quotes.en: The slower will never be overtaken by the faster.

quotes.zh: 运动不存在。
quotes.en: Motion is nothing.

quotes.zh: 飞矢不动——在每一瞬间,它都占据一个与自身等大的空间。
quotes.en: The arrow at rest: at every moment it occupies a space equal to itself.

quotes.zh: 二与一是同一的——多可以归结为一。
quotes.en: Two and one are the same; the many resolve into the one.

counter_patterns: 运动是矛盾的反证对象
数学无穷是逻辑陷阱
经验直观不能反驳逻辑

bio_zh: 未著书,思想经由柏拉图对话录传世。以'产婆术'式诘问法追问德性、知识、虔敬。被雅典法庭判死。
bio_en: Left no writings; known via Plato. Used *maieutics*. Condemned by Athens for 'corrupting the youth'.

quotes.zh: 未经省察的人生不值得过。
quotes.en: The unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.source_zh: 柏拉图《苏格拉底的辩护》38a

quotes.zh: 我知道我一无所知。
quotes.en: I know that I know nothing.
quotes.source_zh: 柏拉图《苏格拉底的辩护》21d

quotes.zh: 德性即知识。
quotes.en: Virtue is knowledge.

quotes.zh: 照顾你的灵魂。
quotes.en: Care for your soul.
quotes.source_zh: 柏拉图《阿尔喀比亚德前篇》

quotes.zh: 对任何人,我都不做无用的师者。
quotes.en: I am not a teacher to anyone in the conventional sense.
quotes.source_zh: 柏拉图《苏格拉底的辩护》33a

quotes.zh: 我知道自己无知,这是我的智慧。
quotes.en: I am aware of my ignorance — that is my wisdom.
quotes.source_zh: 柏拉图《苏格拉底的辩护》

core_theses: 未经省察的人生不值得过
counter_patterns: 未经定义的术语无法讨论
所有人都以为知道的恰恰是未知的
道德权威常常伪装成知识

bio_zh: 苏格拉底弟子,亚里士多德之师。在雅典创办'学园'。以理念论、洞穴喻奠定西方形而上学传统。
bio_en: Student of Socrates, teacher of Aristotle. Founded the Academy. Founded Western metaphysics via Forms and the Cave.

quotes.zh: 哲学始于惊奇。
quotes.en: Philosophy begins in wonder.

quotes.zh: 洞穴中的人把影子当作真实。
quotes.en: The prisoners in the cave mistake shadows for reality.

quotes.zh: 善的理念是最高的知识对象。
quotes.en: The Form of the Good is the highest object of knowledge.

quotes.zh: 身体是灵魂的牢笼。
quotes.en: The body is the prison of the soul.

quotes.zh: 没有哲学王的国家不可能幸福。
quotes.en: A state is not happy unless its rulers are philosophers.

quotes.zh: 爱欲是对永恒的渴望。
quotes.en: Eros is the desire for the eternal.

quotes.zh: 灵魂三分:理性、激情、欲望。
quotes.en: The soul has three parts: reason, spirit, appetite.

core_theses: 洞穴喻:多数人活在影子中
counter_patterns: 经验论者没有看到更高的实在
民主制把无知放在专家之上
相对主义者混淆了意见与知识
rebuttal_style: 理念论 + 比喻 (洞穴 / 线段)

bio_zh: 柏拉图弟子,亚历山大大帝之师。创立形式逻辑、生物学、形而上学体系。强调中庸之道与幸福。
bio_en: Student of Plato, tutor to Alexander. Founded formal logic, biology, and metaphysics. Emphasized the golden mean.

quotes.zh: 人是政治的动物。
quotes.en: Man is by nature a political animal.

quotes.zh: 中庸是美德的本质。
quotes.en: Virtue is a mean between two extremes.

quotes.zh: 吾爱吾师,吾更爱真理。
quotes.en: Plato is dear to me, but dearer still is truth.

quotes.zh: 幸福是灵魂合于德性的活动。
quotes.en: Happiness is an activity of the soul in accordance with virtue.

quotes.zh: 四因:质料因、形式因、动力因、目的因。
quotes.en: Four causes: material, formal, efficient, final.

quotes.zh: 诗比历史更哲学。
quotes.en: Poetry is more philosophical than history.

quotes.zh: 国家的本性先于家庭与个人。
quotes.en: The state is prior in nature to the family and the individual.

core_theses: 幸福是合于德性的活动
counter_patterns: 极端理念论是脱离经验的
柏拉图的'善'过于抽象
民主与寡头各有其理
rebuttal_style: 经验归纳 + 范畴分析

bio_zh: 创立'花园',强调通过节制获得心灵的宁静(ataraxia)。
bio_en: Founded the Garden. Emphasized tranquility (*ataraxia*) through moderation.

quotes.zh: 快乐是幸福生活的开端与终结。
quotes.en: Pleasure is the beginning and the end of the happy life.

quotes.zh: 死亡与我们无关——当我们存在时,死亡不来;当死亡来时,我们已不存在。
quotes.en: Death is nothing to us: when we are, death is not; when death is, we are not.

quotes.zh: 神不干预世界。
quotes.en: The gods do not intervene in the world.

quotes.zh: 一切善之最大者为明智。
quotes.en: Of all the goods, prudence is the greatest.

quotes.zh: 无欲则无忧。
quotes.en: Where there is no desire, there is no pain.

counter_patterns: 痛苦中如何求快乐?
对神的传统信仰是恐惧的产物
无神论者要直面宇宙的冷漠

bio_zh: 古希腊怀疑主义创始人。强调对任何判断都应不偏不倚(epoché),以达至心灵安宁。
bio_en: Founder of Greek skepticism. Advocated *epoché* on all judgments to achieve tranquility.

quotes.zh: 最高的美德是无所定夺。
quotes.en: The highest good is the absence of any determination.
quotes.source_zh: 塞克斯都·恩披里柯《皮浪学说概要》

quotes.zh: 事物自身不可知,人只能把握现象。
quotes.en: Things themselves are unknowable; we grasp only appearances.

quotes.zh: 悬置判断带来心灵的平静。
quotes.en: Suspension of judgment brings tranquility.

quotes.zh: 对任何事都不作判断。
quotes.en: Make no judgment about anything.

quotes.zh: 智慧在于不动心。
quotes.en: Wisdom lies in imperturbability.

counter_patterns: 行动需要信念
连'不可知'本身也是判断
怀疑论常被教条主义反驳

bio_zh: 斯多葛学派创始人。强调顺应自然(logos)与命运,德性是唯一善。
bio_en: Founder of Stoicism. Stressed living in accord with *logos* and fate; virtue as the sole good.

quotes.zh: 顺应自然而活。
quotes.en: Live in accord with nature.

quotes.zh: 命运带领顺从者,拖拽抗拒者。
quotes.en: Fate leads the willing and drags the unwilling.

quotes.zh: 德性是唯一善,恶是唯一恶,其他皆无所谓。
quotes.en: Virtue is the only good; vice the only evil; all else is indifferent.

quotes.zh: 理性是完美德性的本质。
quotes.en: Reason is the essence of perfect virtue.

quotes.zh: 不动心(apathia)是智者的状态。
quotes.en: Apathy is the sage's condition.

counter_patterns: 激情不是全恶,需被理性引导
完全冷漠是反人性
命运与责任的张力

bio_zh: 罗马斯多葛代表,尼禄之师,后被迫自杀。《道德书信集》是实践伦理学经典。
bio_en: Roman Stoic, tutor to Nero, later forced to suicide. *Moral Letters* is a practical ethics classic.

quotes.zh: 我们受苦的不是事件本身,而是对事件的判断。
quotes.en: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.

quotes.zh: 每一天都当作生命的最后一天来过。
quotes.en: Every day as though it were the last.

quotes.zh: 哲学不是用来炫耀的学问,而是生活的法则。
quotes.en: Philosophy is not a popular pursuit, but a rule of life.

quotes.zh: 时间是我们最稀缺的财富。
quotes.en: Time is the most valuable thing we have.

quotes.zh: 财富是奴隶,自由是主。
quotes.en: Wealth is the slave of the wise man.

core_theses: 我们受苦的是判断而非事件
counter_patterns: 沉思不是逃避行动
财富本身不是恶,贪欲才是
友谊需要脆弱性

bio_zh: 奴隶出身的斯多葛哲人。强调'区分能控制与不能控制'(dichotomy of control)。
bio_en: Stoic philosopher born into slavery. Emphasized the dichotomy of control.

quotes.zh: 扰乱人的不是事件,而是人对此事件的判断。
quotes.en: It's not things that disturb people, but their judgments about them.

quotes.zh: 能控制的:意见、动机、欲望、厌恶。不能控制的:身体、财富、声誉、权力。
quotes.en: In our control: opinion, motivation, desire, aversion. Not: body, wealth, reputation, power.

quotes.zh: 承受而不抱怨。
quotes.en: Bear and forbear.

quotes.zh: 不要求事情如你所愿,愿事情如所是。
quotes.en: Do not demand that events should happen as you wish; wish them to happen as they do.

quotes.zh: 在一切事物中等待死亡。
quotes.en: Practice death in all things.

core_theses: 能控制与不能控制的二分
counter_patterns: 完全顺从是不正义的
情感压抑有害
社会结构造成的不公不能仅用态度回应

bio_zh: 罗马皇帝,《沉思录》作者。在战乱中以斯多葛哲学自我砥砺。
bio_en: Roman emperor, author of *Meditations*. Wrote Stoic self-counsel during military campaigns.

quotes.zh: 你有权力不对自己的心灵做任何伤害。
quotes.en: You have power over your mind — not outside events.

quotes.zh: 宇宙即变化,生活即思想。
quotes.en: The universe is change; life is opinion.

quotes.zh: 阻碍你的不是事物的本性,而是你对事物的看法。
quotes.en: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.

quotes.zh: 接纳命运。
quotes.en: Accept whatever comes to you woven in the pattern of your life.

quotes.zh: 人是相互依存的。
quotes.en: We are made for cooperation.

quotes.zh: 一个人的价值等于他给自己的价值。
quotes.en: A man's worth is no greater than the worth of his ambitions.

core_theses: 宇宙即变化,生活即思想
counter_patterns: 责任感有时要求打破平静
接纳不等于顺从不义
权位的孤独不能用自我对话解决

bio_zh: 基督教神学奠基人之一。《忏悔录》《上帝之城》。
bio_en: Founding figure of Christian theology. *Confessions* and *City of God*.

quotes.zh: 我们的心不安宁,在你里面才得安宁。
quotes.en: Our heart is restless until it rests in You.

quotes.zh: 时间若不被问,我知道;被问时,我便茫然。
quotes.en: What then is time? If no one asks me, I know; if I wish to explain it, I do not know.

quotes.zh: 信仰寻求理解。
quotes.en: Faith seeking understanding.

quotes.zh: 我信,故我思。
quotes.en: Crede ut intelligas — I believe in order that I may understand.

quotes.zh: 两座城:一座由自爱,一座由爱神。
quotes.en: Two cities: one built on self-love, the other on the love of God.

quotes.zh: 恶没有实体。
quotes.en: Evil has no substance.

core_theses: 我们的心不安宁,在神里面才得安宁
counter_patterns: 理性不足以达到真理
世俗秩序不能自我救赎
恶的根源在意志的转向
rebuttal_style: 自传叙述 + 内在皈依

bio_zh: 将亚里士多德逻辑引入拉丁世界,《哲学的慰藉》在狱中所著,论恶与命运。
bio_en: Introduced Aristotelian logic to the Latin world. Wrote *Consolation of Philosophy* in prison.

quotes.zh: 你从未失去任何真正属于你的东西。
quotes.en: You have never lost what you have never possessed.

quotes.zh: 恶无非善的缺失。
quotes.en: Evil is nothing but the absence of good.

quotes.zh: 幸福不是运气,而是德性。
quotes.en: Fortune is not happiness; virtue is.

quotes.zh: 理性高于激情,但被激情扰乱时更显其伟大。
quotes.en: Reason is above passion; when disturbed, its greatness is more apparent.

quotes.zh: 真正的贵族是德性。
quotes.en: True nobility is virtue.

counter_patterns: 哲学慰藉不能替代行动
神意对恶的解释仍不充分
理性与信仰的边界
rebuttal_style: 对话体 + 拟人化哲学

bio_zh: 提出'本体论论证':上帝是'无可设想的最伟大者',必然存在。
bio_en: Formulated the ontological argument: God as 'that than which nothing greater can be conceived'.

quotes.zh: 上帝是无可设想的最伟大者。
quotes.en: God is that than which nothing greater can be conceived.

quotes.zh: 我信,是为了理解。
quotes.en: I do not seek to understand in order that I may believe, but I believe in order that I may understand.

quotes.zh: 神是无限的本质。
quotes.en: God is the infinite being.

quotes.zh: 上帝存在于理解中——即使愚人心中也如此。
quotes.en: God exists in the understanding — even the fool in his heart.

quotes.zh: 正义者将获得补偿,恶者将受惩罚。
quotes.en: The just will be rewarded; the unjust punished.

core_theses: 上帝是无可设想的最伟大者(本体论证明)
counter_patterns: 存在不是谓词
信仰不能预设理解
完美性论证预设了神存在
rebuttal_style: 本体论 + 经院式演绎

bio_zh: 托马斯神学集大成者。《神学大全》以亚里士多德哲学重构基督教神学,提出'五路证明'。
bio_en: Synthesizer of Thomistic theology. *Summa Theologica* via Aristotle, presenting the Five Ways.

quotes.zh: 信仰与理性不矛盾。
quotes.en: Faith and reason are not opposed.

quotes.zh: 上帝的存在可以由理性证明:五路(运动、因果、偶然、等级、目的)。
quotes.en: The existence of God is provable by reason in five ways.

quotes.zh: 法律是理性的命令。
quotes.en: Law is a dictate of reason.

quotes.zh: 善是万物之所欲。
quotes.en: Good is what all things desire.

quotes.zh: 恩典成全自然,而非摧毁。
quotes.en: Grace does not destroy nature, but perfects it.

quotes.zh: 人不单为政治秩序而存在,也为沉思神而存在。
quotes.en: Man is not ordered to political society as his ultimate end.

quotes.zh: 人的最高幸福是默观上帝。
quotes.en: Man's ultimate happiness is the contemplation of God.

core_theses: 上帝存在可以由五路证明
counter_patterns: 信仰不能完全被理性证明
自然法在不同文化有不同
神恩超越人的理解
rebuttal_style: 五路法 + 亚里士多德综合

bio_zh: 奥卡姆剃刀'如无必要,勿增实体'。唯名论顶峰。
bio_en: Originator of Occam's Razor: 'Entities should not be multiplied beyond necessity'. Nominalist.

quotes.zh: 如无必要,勿增实体。
quotes.en: Entities should not be multiplied beyond necessity.

quotes.zh: 唯有个体存在;共相是名称。
quotes.en: Only individuals exist; universals are names.

quotes.zh: 政治权力应分散而非集中在教皇与皇帝手中。
quotes.en: Political power should be dispersed, not concentrated.
quotes.source_en: *On the Power of Emperors and Popes*

quotes.zh: 信仰与理性各有其领域,不互相侵犯。
quotes.en: Faith and reason each have their proper domain.

quotes.zh: 神的全能与自然法则之关系。
quotes.en: The relationship between God's omnipotence and natural law.

core_theses: 如无必要,勿增实体(奥卡姆剃刀)
counter_patterns: 剃刀原则不能用于信仰
普遍概念的语言学解释不充分
个体主义的政治风险

bio_zh: 现代哲学之父。《第一哲学沉思集》提出'我思故我在',建立了二元论(心-身)。
bio_en: Father of modern philosophy. *Meditations* proposes 'Cogito, ergo sum' and mind-body dualism.

quotes.zh: 我思故我在。
quotes.en: I think, therefore I am.

quotes.zh: 怀疑一切可以被怀疑的。
quotes.en: Doubt everything that can be doubted.

quotes.zh: 清晰明确的知觉是真理的标志。
quotes.en: Clear and distinct perception is the mark of truth.

quotes.zh: 身心是两个独立的实体。
quotes.en: Mind and body are two distinct substances.

quotes.zh: 广延是物体的本质属性。
quotes.en: Extension is the essence of body.

quotes.zh: '我'是一个思想的东西。
quotes.en: I am a thinking thing (*res cogitans*).

core_theses: 清晰明确的知觉是真理的标志
counter_patterns: 怀疑本身需要一个怀疑者(循环)
身心如何交互?
清楚不等于真实

bio_zh: 《伦理学》提出'神即自然'(Deus sive Natura),以几何学方式建构哲学体系。
bio_en: *Ethics* presents 'God, or Nature' (*Deus sive Natura*); built philosophy in geometric form.

quotes.zh: 神即自然。
quotes.en: God, or Nature (*Deus sive Natura*).

quotes.zh: 自由是对必然的认识。
quotes.en: Freedom is the recognition of necessity.

quotes.zh: 一切规定都是否定。
quotes.en: All determination is negation.

quotes.zh: 人类的枷锁是情感的力量。
quotes.en: The bondage of man is the impotence of the emotions.

quotes.zh: 心灵的命令、欲望与身体的决定是同时发生的。
quotes.en: The decisions of the mind are nothing but the appetites themselves.

quotes.zh: 心安(acquiescentia)来自对神的理智之爱。
quotes.en: Tranquility arises from the intellectual love of God.

counter_patterns: 泛神论抹消了道德责任
决定论削弱了行动意义
几何学方法不适用于伦理
rebuttal_style: 几何学公理 + 一元论

bio_zh: 《人类理解论》提出白板说(tabula rasa)。政治哲学上是自由主义之父。
bio_en: *Essay Concerning Human Understanding* — mind as *tabula rasa*. Founding father of liberalism.

quotes.zh: 人心本是白纸。
quotes.en: The mind is a blank slate (*tabula rasa*).

quotes.zh: 天赋权利:生命、自由、财产。
quotes.en: Natural rights: life, liberty, property.

quotes.zh: 政府的合法性来自被统治者的同意。
quotes.en: The legitimacy of government derives from the consent of the governed.

quotes.zh: 宗教宽容是必要的——任何人都不应被迫相信。
quotes.en: Religious toleration is necessary.

quotes.zh: 政府的目的是保护财产。
quotes.en: The end of government is the preservation of property.

quotes.zh: 我们所有的知识都建立在经验之上。
quotes.en: All our knowledge is founded in experience.

core_theses: 天赋权利:生命自由财产
政府合法性来自被统治者同意
counter_patterns: 白板说低估了先天结构
财产权的劳动理论难以界定
同意理论在实践中难以操作

bio_zh: 与牛顿共同发明微积分。《单子论》提出'单子'(monads)。
bio_en: Co-inventor of calculus. *Monadology* introduces monads; 'the best of all possible worlds'.

quotes.zh: 这个世界是所有可能世界中最好的。
quotes.en: This is the best of all possible worlds.

quotes.zh: 单子是单纯的实体,无广延,不可分。
quotes.en: Monads are simple substances without extension, indivisible.

quotes.zh: 充足理由原则。
quotes.en: Principle of sufficient reason: nothing is without reason.

quotes.zh: pre-established harmony——身心之间预定和谐。
quotes.en: Pre-established harmony between mind and body.

quotes.zh: 有两种真理:理性的真理与事实的真理。
quotes.en: Two kinds of truth: truths of reason and truths of fact.

core_theses: 这个世界是所有可能世界中最好的
counter_patterns: 现存世界明明充满恶
可能的单子无法被经验观察
充足理由滑向决定论

bio_zh: 主张'存在即被感知'(esse est percipi)。极端经验主义。
bio_en: Maintained *esse est percipi* — to be is to be perceived. Radical empiricism.

quotes.zh: 存在就是被感知。
quotes.en: To be is to be perceived (*esse est percipi*).

quotes.zh: 物质是不存在的——只有精神与观念。
quotes.en: Matter does not exist — only minds and ideas.

quotes.zh: 观念的联系不是任意的——而是上帝所建立的。
quotes.en: The connection of ideas is not arbitrary — it is established by God.

quotes.zh: 我们只通过感官认识事物,没有抽象观念。
quotes.en: We know things only by the senses; there are no abstract ideas.

quotes.zh: 距离是感觉的混合。
quotes.en: Distance is a mixture of sensations.
quotes.source_en: *Essay Towards a New Theory of Vision*

counter_patterns: 唯心论难以解释科学规律
感知的对象不能脱离感知者(无穷后退)
常识的物理对象观
rebuttal_style: 主观唯心 + 神作为持续感知者

bio_zh: 《人性论》对因果、归纳、自我提出怀疑。是康德'独断论之沉睡'的惊醒者。
bio_en: *Treatise of Human Nature* questions causation, induction, the self. Awakened Kant from dogmatic slumber.

quotes.zh: 因果不是事物本身,而是习惯性联想。
quotes.en: Causation is not in things but in habitual mental association.

quotes.zh: 从'是'不能推出'应当'。
quotes.en: You cannot derive 'ought' from 'is'.

quotes.zh: 没有任何关于神的经验基础。
quotes.en: There is no empirical basis for belief in God.

quotes.zh: 理性是激情的奴隶。
quotes.en: Reason is the slave of the passions.

quotes.zh: 自我是一束感觉的集合。
quotes.en: The self is a bundle of perceptions.

quotes.zh: 奇迹的违反自然,使其本身成为最有力的反证。
quotes.en: A miracle is a violation of natural law — and therefore the strongest refutation of itself.

core_theses: 自我是一束感觉的集合
counter_patterns: 怀疑论是自毁的(用理性反对理性)
习惯可能揭示真实结构
休谟本人不能活出怀疑论
rebuttal_style: 经验主义 + 还原分析

bio_zh: 《纯粹理性批判》发动'哥白尼式革命'。
bio_en: *Critique of Pure Reason* — the 'Copernican revolution'.

quotes.zh: 有两种东西,越是经常而持久地对它们进行思考,就越是使心灵充满常新而日益增长的惊赞和敬畏:头上的星空与心中的道德法则。
quotes.en: Two things fill the mind with ever new admiration and awe: the starry heavens above and the moral law within.

quotes.zh: 要这样行动,使你的行为准则能够成为普遍法则。
quotes.en: Act only on that maxim which you can at the same time will to become a universal law.

quotes.zh: 人为自然立法。
quotes.en: The mind legislates to nature.

quotes.zh: 我能知道什么?我应当做什么?我可以希望什么?人是什么?
quotes.en: What can I know? What ought I to do? What may I hope? What is man?

quotes.zh: 永久和平——这是人类的最高政治理想。
quotes.en: Perpetual peace is the highest political ideal.

quotes.zh: 人是目的,而非工具。
quotes.en: Man is an end, not a means.

quotes.zh: 审美判断是无利害的愉悦。
quotes.en: Aesthetic judgment is disinterested pleasure.

quotes.zh: 启蒙是人从自我招致的不成熟状态中走出来。
quotes.en: Enlightenment is man's emergence from self-imposed immaturity.

core_theses: 头上的星空与心中的道德法则
绝对命令:可普遍化的准则
counter_patterns: 先验综合判断的合法性需要说明
物自体不可知限制了知识范围
绝对命令在具体情境中难以操作
rebuttal_style: 先验论证 + 二律背反

bio_zh: 知识学奠基。'自我设定非我'。
bio_en: Founder of *Wissenschaftslehre* (Science of Knowledge). 'The I posits the not-I'.

quotes.zh: 自我设定自身。
quotes.en: The I posits itself.

quotes.zh: 自我设定非我。
quotes.en: The I posits the not-I.

quotes.zh: 民族是一种神圣的事业。
quotes.en: A nation is a sacred enterprise.

quotes.zh: 行动!行动!这就是我们存在的本质。
quotes.en: Act! Act! This is the essence of our being.

counter_patterns: 绝对自我难以独立于非我
实践理性取代理论理性的代价
民族主义被滥用

bio_zh: 自然哲学的代表。试图扬弃主体与客体的分裂。
bio_en: Representative of Naturphilosophie. Aimed to overcome subject-object split.

quotes.zh: 自然应是可见的精神,精神应是不可见的自然。
quotes.en: Nature is visible spirit; spirit is invisible nature.

quotes.zh: 绝对者是主体与客体的无差别点。
quotes.en: The Absolute is the indifference-point of subject and object.

quotes.zh: 艺术哲学是哲学的真正工具。
quotes.en: Art is the true organ of philosophy.

quotes.zh: 世界时代的三个阶段:古代(命运)、近代(自然)、未来(天命)。
quotes.en: Three World Ages: ancient (fate), modern (nature), future (providence).

core_theses: 绝对者是主体与客体的无差别点
counter_patterns: 自然哲学的浪漫主义有反科学风险
无差别点难以被规定
同一哲学难以保持张力
rebuttal_style: 自然哲学 + 同一哲学

bio_zh: 辩证法集大成者。
bio_en: Great systematizer of dialectics.

quotes.zh: 凡是合理的都是现实的,凡是现实的都是合理的。
quotes.en: What is rational is actual; what is actual is rational.

quotes.zh: 实体本质上就是主体。
quotes.en: Substance is essentially subject.

quotes.zh: 真理是全体。
quotes.en: The truth is the whole.

quotes.zh: 密涅瓦的猫头鹰在黄昏才起飞。
quotes.en: The owl of Minerva spreads its wings only with the falling of dusk.

quotes.zh: 奴隶通过劳动获得自由。
quotes.en: The slave gains freedom through labor.

core_theses: 凡是合理的都是现实的
counter_patterns: 辩证法是否只事后合理化
历史终结论的危险
绝对精神的形而上学假设

bio_zh: 《作为意志和表象的世界》提出意志本体论与悲观主义。
bio_en: *The World as Will and Representation* — will as the inner nature of reality; pessimism.

quotes.zh: 世界是我的表象。
quotes.en: The world is my representation.

quotes.zh: 意志是世界的内核。
quotes.en: Will is the kernel of the world.

quotes.zh: 生命是一团欲望,不被痛苦则感无聊。
quotes.en: Life swings between suffering and boredom.

quotes.zh: 同情是道德的唯一来源。
quotes.en: Compassion is the basis of all morality.

core_theses: 同情是道德的唯一来源
counter_patterns: 悲观主义易于放弃行动
同情不能解决结构性恶
意志一元论过于简化
rebuttal_style: 意志形而上学 + 悲观修辞

bio_zh: 以'信仰之跃'闻名,反对黑格尔体系哲学。
bio_en: Known for the 'leap of faith'; opposed Hegelian system-building.

quotes.zh: 你必须自己去跳跃。
quotes.en: You must make the leap yourself.

quotes.zh: 真理是主观性。
quotes.en: Truth is subjectivity.

quotes.zh: 焦虑是自由的眩晕。
quotes.en: Anxiety is the dizziness of freedom.

quotes.zh: 人生只能倒着理解,但必须正着度过。
quotes.en: Life can only be understood backward, but must be lived forward.

quotes.zh: 信仰是超越伦理的荒谬之跃。
quotes.en: Faith is a leap above the ethical into the absurd.

quotes.zh: 绝望是致死的疾病。
quotes.en: Despair is the sickness unto death.

quotes.zh: 信仰是内心无限热情与客观不确定性之间的张力。
quotes.en: Faith is the tension between infinite passion and objective uncertainty.

counter_patterns: 信仰之跃不能成为逃避理性的借口
主观性不能取代客观真理
存在主义容易孤立个体

bio_zh: 《资本论》提出劳动价值论与剩余价值理论。
bio_en: *Capital* — labor theory of value and surplus value.

quotes.zh: 哲学家们只是用不同的方式解释世界,问题在于改变世界。
quotes.en: Philosophers have only interpreted the world; the point is to change it.

quotes.zh: 宗教是被压迫生灵的叹息,是人民的鸦片。
quotes.en: Religion is the sigh of the oppressed creature, the opium of the people.

quotes.zh: 一切固有的东西都烟消云散了。
quotes.en: All that is solid melts into air.

quotes.zh: 工人没有祖国。
quotes.en: The workingmen have no country.

quotes.zh: 商品拜物教——人与人通过物与物的关系而存在。
quotes.en: Commodity fetishism — social relations appear as relations between things.

quotes.zh: 下层建筑决定上层建筑。
quotes.en: The economic base determines the cultural superstructure.
quotes.source_en: *A Contribution to the Critique of Political Economy*

quotes.zh: 暴力是历史的助产婆。
quotes.en: Violence is the midwife of history.

core_theses: 哲学家只是解释世界,问题在于改变
下层建筑决定上层建筑
counter_patterns: 阶级分析忽略了其他压迫形式
革命后权力集中
经济决定论过于简化
rebuttal_style: 历史唯物主义 + 政治经济学批判

school: 唯意志论 / 后现代先驱
bio_zh: 宣布'上帝已死',提出永恒轮回、权力意志、价值重估。
bio_en: Declared 'God is dead'; eternal recurrence, will to power, transvaluation of values.

quotes.zh: 上帝已死。
quotes.en: God is dead.

quotes.zh: 当你凝视深渊时,深渊也在凝视你。
quotes.en: When you gaze long into the abyss, the abyss gazes back.

quotes.zh: 成为你自己。
quotes.en: Become who you are.

quotes.zh: 那些杀不死我的,使我更强大。
quotes.en: That which does not kill us makes us stronger.

quotes.zh: 对永恒轮回的最终肯定——这是最高的肯定公式。
quotes.en: The greatest weight: What if some day or night a demon were to steal into your lonely loneliness and say: 'You will have to live this life once more'?

quotes.zh: 主人道德与奴隶道德。
quotes.en: Master morality and slave morality.

quotes.zh: "善"与"恶"的概念源于"善"与"坏"的混淆。
quotes.en: The concepts of "good" and "evil" arise from a confusion of "good" and "bad".

counter_patterns: 虚无主义可能为强权辩护
永恒轮回是心理实验而非论证
超人概念有被滥用风险

bio_zh: 《论自由》提出伤害原则;完善功利主义。
bio_en: *On Liberty* — harm principle; refined utilitarianism.

quotes.zh: 一个人的自由,以不伤害他人的自由为界。
quotes.en: The only purpose for which power can be rightfully exercised over any member of a civilized community, against his will, is to prevent harm to others.

quotes.zh: 最大多数人的最大幸福。
quotes.en: The greatest happiness of the greatest number.

quotes.zh: 言论自由是通向真理的途径。
quotes.en: Free expression is the path to truth.

quotes.zh: 一盎司自己的自由胜过一吨他人的保护。
quotes.en: Better an ounce of one's own liberty than a ton of others' protection.

quotes.zh: 做一个不满足的人胜于做一头满足的猪。
quotes.en: Better to be a human being dissatisfied than a pig satisfied.

core_theses: 最大多数人的最大幸福
言论自由是通向真理的途径
counter_patterns: 功利主义难以衡量质性快乐
伤害原则的边界模糊
民主中多数可能压迫少数
rebuttal_style: 功利计算 + 自由主义

bio_zh: 实用主义创始人之一。
bio_en: Co-founder of pragmatism.

quotes.zh: 真理是有效的信念。
quotes.en: Truth is what works.

quotes.zh: 思想有用就是真的。
quotes.en: A true idea is one that is useful.

quotes.zh: 宗教经验的多元性应被尊重。
quotes.en: The variety of religious experience should be respected.

quotes.zh: 相信上帝,因为相信带来勇气。
quotes.en: Believe in God because belief gives courage.

quotes.zh: 实用主义的方法——以实践后果为意义判据。
quotes.en: The pragmatic method — practical consequences as the criterion of meaning.

counter_patterns: 实用主义可能滑向相对主义
真理'有用'太宽
忽视客观证据的风险
rebuttal_style: 实用主义 + 经验多元

bio_zh: 现代现象学创始人。提出'回到事物本身'。
bio_en: Founder of modern phenomenology. 'Back to the things themselves'.

quotes.zh: 回到事物本身。
quotes.en: Back to the things themselves (*Zu den Sachen selbst*).

quotes.zh: 意识的意向性:意识总是关于某物的意识。
quotes.en: All consciousness is consciousness of something.

quotes.zh: 生活世界是科学的基础。
quotes.en: The lifeworld is the foundation of science.

quotes.zh: 现象学的悬置——把自然态度加上括号。
quotes.en: Phenomenological epoché — bracketing the natural attitude.

core_theses: 生活世界是科学的基础
counter_patterns: 纯粹意识难以从自然态度中完全分离
生活世界的概念仍有自然主义残余
先验主体性是形而上学

bio_zh: 《存在与时间》以'此在'(Dasein)分析存在。
bio_en: *Being and Time* — analysis of Dasein and the meaning of being.

quotes.zh: 此在是一种存在者,其存在方式即在世界中存在。
quotes.en: Dasein is an entity whose being is its own.

quotes.zh: 存在是被遗忘的。
quotes.en: Being is the most self-evident yet forgotten.

quotes.zh: 向死而在——本真性的存在方式。
quotes.en: Being-toward-death is the mode of authentic existence.

quotes.zh: 语言是存在的家。
quotes.en: Language is the house of Being.

quotes.zh: 技术是一种解蔽方式,但也是最大的危险。
quotes.en: Technology is a way of revealing, but also the supreme danger.

quotes.zh: '此'是此在——我即在那里。
quotes.en: 'Da-sein' — being the there.

counter_patterns: 此在分析难以脱离人类中心
语言本体化混淆了语言与存在
对技术的态度有反现代性
rebuttal_style: 存在论 + 现象学描述

bio_zh: 《存在与虚无》提出'存在先于本质',自由与责任。
bio_en: *Being and Nothingness* — existence precedes essence; radical freedom and responsibility.

quotes.zh: 存在先于本质。
quotes.en: Existence precedes essence.

quotes.zh: 人注定是自由的。
quotes.en: Man is condemned to be free.

quotes.zh: 他人即地狱。
quotes.en: Hell is other people.

quotes.zh: 自由是一种重负。
quotes.en: Freedom is a burden.

quotes.zh: 懦夫是自己造成懦夫,英雄是自己造成英雄。
quotes.en: The coward makes himself a coward; the hero makes himself a hero.

counter_patterns: 绝对自由是抽象的(忽略情境)
他人即地狱过于对抗
自欺理论难以证伪
rebuttal_style: 现象学本体论 + 自由分析

bio_zh: 《知觉现象学》以身体主体取代纯粹意识。
bio_en: *Phenomenology of Perception* — the body-subject replaces pure consciousness.

quotes.zh: 我是我的身体。
quotes.en: I am my body.

quotes.zh: 身体是我们拥有世界的一般方式。
quotes.en: The body is our general medium for having a world.

quotes.zh: 可见者与不可见者——肉身是世界的纽结。
quotes.en: The visible and the invisible — the flesh is the chiasm of the world.

quotes.zh: 身体主体——不是'我有身体'而是'我是身体'。
quotes.en: The body-subject — not 'I have a body' but 'I am my body'.

core_theses: 身体是我们拥有世界的一般方式
counter_patterns: 身体现象学难以解释认知
肉身本体论仍有神秘色彩
知觉分析与科学的张力
rebuttal_style: 身体现象学 + 存在分析

bio_zh: 《西西弗神话》以荒诞与反抗为主题。
bio_en: *The Myth of Sisyphus* — the absurd and revolt.

quotes.zh: 只有一个真正严肃的哲学问题,就是自杀。
quotes.en: There is but one truly serious philosophical problem, and that is suicide.

quotes.zh: 反抗是人对自身价值的永恒坚持。
quotes.en: Revolt is the perpetual struggle of man against his own darkness.

quotes.zh: 应当想象西西弗是幸福的。
quotes.en: One must imagine Sisyphus happy.

quotes.zh: 荒诞产生于人类呼唤与世界不合理沉默之间的对峙。
quotes.en: The absurd is born of the confrontation between the human need for meaning and the unreasonable silence of the world.

quotes.zh: 我相信正义,但正义之前要先爱。
quotes.en: I believe in justice, but I will defend my mother before justice.

core_theses: 真正严肃的哲学问题是自杀
荒诞产生于人类呼唤与世界沉默的对峙
应当想象西西弗是幸福的
反抗是人对自身价值的永恒坚持
counter_patterns: 荒诞哲学可能鼓励冷漠
反抗不能替代具体行动
西西弗的幸福是审美而非伦理

bio_zh: 现代逻辑奠基人。
bio_en: Founder of modern logic.

quotes.zh: 概念文字——一种模仿算术的形式语言。
quotes.en: Begriffsschrift — a formal language imitating arithmetic.

quotes.zh: 意义指称理论。
quotes.en: Sense and reference (*Sinn und Bedeutung*).

quotes.zh: 数的概念是逻辑的产物。
quotes.en: The concept of number is a logical product.

quotes.zh: 同一性是关系的而非属性的。
quotes.en: Identity is a relation, not a property.

quotes.zh: 算术是逻辑的一部分。
quotes.en: Arithmetic is a branch of logic.

core_theses: 概念文字是模仿算术的形式语言
counter_patterns: 形式化不能解释数学直觉
意义/指称二元有第三种情况
逻辑主义对无穷的还原不充分

bio_zh: 《数学原理》与怀特海合著,逻辑原子主义。
bio_en: *Principia Mathematica* with Whitehead; logical atomism.

quotes.zh: 世界由简单的事实构成。
quotes.en: The world is composed of simple facts.

quotes.zh: 神秘主义始于宇宙之爱。
quotes.en: Mysticism begins with cosmic love.

quotes.zh: 世界充满了奇妙之事,我们只要不放弃寻找,就会发现它。
quotes.en: The world is full of magical things patiently waiting for our wits to grow sharper.

quotes.zh: 数学是所有精密知识中无与伦比的杰作。
quotes.en: Mathematics, rightly viewed, possesses not only truth, but supreme beauty.

quotes.zh: 科学始于惊奇,终于理解。
quotes.en: Science begins in wonder and ends in understanding.

core_theses: 世界由简单的事实构成
counter_patterns: 逻辑原子主义对关系不充分
类型论过于复杂
日常语言有逻辑无法还原的部分

bio_zh: 前期《逻辑哲学论》,后期《哲学研究》——语言游戏。
bio_en: Early *Tractatus*; later *Philosophical Investigations* — language-games.

quotes.zh: 凡是可以言说的,都能清晰地言说;对不可言说之物,必须保持沉默。
quotes.en: Whereof one cannot speak, thereof one must be silent.

quotes.zh: 图像论:命题是现实的图像。
quotes.en: A proposition is a model of reality.

quotes.zh: 语言的意义在于其使用。
quotes.en: The meaning of a word is its use in the language.

quotes.zh: 凡是哲学的疾病,都是语言不通的疾病。
quotes.en: All philosophy is a critique of language.

quotes.zh: 我的梯子在爬上去后必须被扔掉。
quotes.en: My ladder must be thrown away after climbing up.

quotes.zh: 私人语言是不可能的。
quotes.en: A private language is impossible.

quotes.zh: 伦理与美学是同一的。
quotes.en: Ethics and aesthetics are one.

core_theses: 凡是不可言说的必须保持沉默
我的梯子爬上去后必须被扔掉
counter_patterns: 语言游戏理论对规则解释不足
私人语言的不可性能否证明
沉默主义削弱了哲学的批判功能

bio_zh: 《命名与必然性》提出严格指示词与可能世界语义学。
bio_en: *Naming and Necessity* — rigid designators and possible-world semantics.

quotes.zh: 专名是严格指示词——在一切可能世界中指称同一对象。
quotes.en: Proper names are rigid designators — they refer to the same object in all possible worlds.

quotes.zh: 必然性是形而上学的,先验性是认识论的。
quotes.en: Necessity is metaphysical; a priority is epistemic.

quotes.zh: '水是 H2O'是必然真理,不是后天综合判断。
quotes.en: 'Water is H2O' is a necessary truth, not a contingent a posteriori judgment.

quotes.zh: 历史因果链决定指称。
quotes.en: A causal-historical chain determines reference.

quotes.zh: 先验偶然命题是可能的。
quotes.en: A priori contingent propositions are possible.

core_theses: 必然性是形而上学的,先验性是认识论的
counter_patterns: 可能世界语义学预设了反事实条件句
先验偶然命题的直觉不普遍
严格指示词无法解释空名
rebuttal_style: 可能世界语义学 + 命名理论

bio_zh: 《正义论》提出'无知之幕'与两条正义原则。
bio_en: *A Theory of Justice* — the veil of ignorance and two principles.

quotes.zh: 正义是社会制度的首要美德。
quotes.en: Justice is the first virtue of social institutions.

quotes.zh: 无知之幕——原初状态下,任何人都不知道自己是谁。
quotes.en: The veil of ignorance — no one knows who they are in the original position.

quotes.zh: 两个原则:平等自由原则;差别原则。
quotes.en: Two principles: equal liberty, then the difference principle.

quotes.zh: 公平机会原则——所有职位都应平等开放。
quotes.en: Fair equality of opportunity — all positions open to all.

quotes.zh: 良序社会——所有公民都接受相同的正义原则。
quotes.en: A well-ordered society — all citizens accept the same principles of justice.

core_theses: 正义是社会制度的首要美德
公平机会原则 + 差别原则
counter_patterns: 原初状态过于理想化
差别原则的直觉难以测量
公共理性可能排斥多元价值

bio_zh: 区分积极自由与消极自由。
bio_en: Distinguished negative from positive liberty.

quotes.zh: 消极自由:免于强制。
quotes.en: Negative liberty: freedom from coercion.

quotes.zh: 积极自由:做自己的主人。
quotes.en: Positive liberty: being one's own master.

quotes.zh: 多元价值的不可化约性。
quotes.en: Value pluralism — values are irreducibly plural.

quotes.zh: 一元论的美好理想是最大的陷阱。
quotes.en: The monistic ideal is the deepest source of totalitarianism.

quotes.zh: '应当'与'是'的根本区分——价值不可从事实推出。
quotes.en: The fundamental distinction between 'is' and 'ought' — values cannot be derived from facts.

quotes.zh: 多元主义主张多种价值的不相容性。
quotes.en: Pluralism asserts the incompatibility of many values.

core_theses: 积极自由:做自己的主人
一元论的美好理想是最大陷阱
counter_patterns: 消极自由也可能压迫(结构性)
价值多元难以裁决冲突
对自由主义的辩护过于西方中心

bio_zh: 《公共领域的结构转型》与交往行为理论。
bio_en: *Structural Transformation of the Public Sphere* and communicative action theory.

quotes.zh: 理性是沟通交往的产物。
quotes.en: Reason is the product of communicative interaction.

quotes.zh: 理想言谈情境——所有人都能平等参与。
quotes.en: The ideal speech situation — all can participate equally.

quotes.zh: 生活世界的殖民化——系统入侵生活世界。
quotes.en: Colonization of the lifeworld — system invading lifeworld.

quotes.zh: 公共领域是公民自由交流的空间。
quotes.en: The public sphere is a space for free civic communication.

quotes.zh: 交往理性的三个有效性宣称:真实、正当、真诚。
quotes.en: Three validity claims: truth, rightness, sincerity.

core_theses: 公共领域是公民自由交流的空间
counter_patterns: 理想言谈情境过于乌托邦
系统对生活世界的渗透未必全恶
交往理性预设了过于平等的对话者
rebuttal_style: 交往理论 + 批判理论

bio_zh: 《人的境况》区分劳动、工作、行动;论极权主义。
bio_en: *The Human Condition* — labor, work, action; on totalitarianism.

quotes.zh: 公共领域是多元性的展示场。
quotes.en: The public realm is the space of appearance for plurality.

quotes.zh: 平庸之恶——不思考的恶。
quotes.en: The banality of evil — thoughtless evil.

quotes.zh: 行动的本质是开启新事物。
quotes.en: The essence of action is to begin something new.

quotes.zh: 人的复数性(plurality)是政治的条件。
quotes.en: Human plurality is the condition of politics.

quotes.zh: 政治的终结——现代社会的反政治趋势。
quotes.en: The End of Politics — modern society's anti-political trend.

quotes.zh: 劳动与工作的区别——劳动维持生命,工作创造世界。
quotes.en: The distinction between labor and work — labor sustains life; work creates a world.

core_theses: 人的复数性是政治的条件
公共领域是多元性的展示场
行动的本质是开启新事物
counter_patterns: 公共领域概念过于雅典化
平庸之恶可能为真恶开脱
政治行动理论难以制度化
rebuttal_style: 现象学 + 政治概念史

bio_zh: 吠檀多不二论奠基人。
bio_en: Founder of Advaita Vedanta (non-dualism).

quotes.zh: 梵我一如——你即是那。
quotes.en: You are That (*tat tvam asi*).

quotes.zh: 世界是梵的幻现(maya)。
quotes.en: The world is the appearance of Brahman (māyā).

quotes.zh: 解脱是认识到'我即是梵'。
quotes.en: Liberation is the recognition that 'I am Brahman'.

quotes.zh: 梵有三相:实有、幻现、虚假。
quotes.en: Brahman has three aspects: real, apparent, illusory.

quotes.zh: 摩耶(Maya)既非存在也非不存在。
quotes.en: Māyā is neither real nor unreal.

quotes.zh: 上梵与下梵——无属性者与有属性者。
quotes.en: Higher and lower Brahman — nirguna and saguna.

core_theses: 解脱是认识到'我即是梵'
counter_patterns: 不二论难以解释多元世界
maya 概念容易被滥用为一切方便
梵我一如的体验难以传达
rebuttal_style: 不二论 + 吠檀多注释

bio_zh: 中观学派创始人。空性之集大成者。
bio_en: Founder of Madhyamaka. Synthesizer of emptiness.

quotes.zh: 一切法无自性。
quotes.en: All phenomena are empty of self-nature (*śūnyatā*).

quotes.zh: 缘起即空。
quotes.en: Dependent origination is emptiness.

quotes.zh: 诸法不自生、不他生、不共生、不无因生。
quotes.en: Things do not arise from themselves, from others, from both, nor without cause.

quotes.zh: 空不异色,色不异空。
quotes.en: Form is emptiness; emptiness is form.

quotes.zh: 八不——不生不灭、不常不断、不一不异、不来不出。
quotes.en: Eight negations: not arising, not ceasing; not eternal, not broken; not identical, not different; not coming, not going.

quotes.zh: 空不是虚无——是缘起的别名。
quotes.en: Emptiness is not nothingness — it is another name for dependent origination.

counter_patterns: 空宗可能滑向虚无主义
中道难以避免极端化
逻辑解构可能削弱修行

bio_zh: 《瑜伽经》整理瑜伽哲学八支。
bio_en: *Yoga Sūtras* — codifies eight-limbed yoga.

quotes.zh: 瑜伽是意识的止息(yogaś citta-vṛtti-nirodhaḥ)。
quotes.en: Yoga is the stilling of the fluctuations of the mind.

quotes.zh: 八支行:持戒、精进、调身、调息、摄念、专注、冥想、三摩地。
quotes.en: Eight limbs of yoga: yamas, niyamas, āsana, prāṇāyāma, pratyāhāra, dhāraṇā, dhyāna, samādhi.

quotes.zh: 障碍是识的转变。
quotes.en: The obstacles are the vicissitudes of consciousness.

quotes.zh: 三摩地是意识专注于一点的状态。
quotes.en: Samādhi is consciousness focused on a single point.

quotes.zh: 解脱是种子之火的熄灭。
quotes.en: Liberation is the quenching of the seed-fires.

quotes.zh: 三德:萨埵、罗阇、答摩。
quotes.en: Three gunas: sattva, rajas, tamas.

counter_patterns: 瑜伽不能解决伦理问题
三德理论过于形而上学
止息意识可能有健康风险
rebuttal_style: 瑜伽经注释 + 心理学分析

bio_zh: 唯识学派创始之一(与无著)。
bio_en: Co-founder of Yogācāra (with Asanga).

quotes.zh: 万法唯识——三界唯心。
quotes.en: All phenomena are consciousness-only.

quotes.zh: 外境无实体,只是识的显现。
quotes.en: External objects are not real, only manifestations of consciousness.

quotes.zh: 阿赖耶识——藏识,万法的种子。
quotes.en: Ālaya-vijñāna — storehouse consciousness, seeds of all phenomena.

quotes.zh: 唯识无境——外境不离识而存在。
quotes.en: Consciousness-only: external objects exist only via consciousness.

quotes.zh: 三性:遍计所执、依他起、圆成实。
quotes.en: Three natures: imagined, dependent, perfected.

counter_patterns: 唯识无境难以解释客观世界
阿赖耶识的形而上学不可证伪
瑜伽行派与唯识的差异被简化

bio_zh: 《神圣人生论》整合瑜伽与进化论。
bio_en: *The Life Divine* — integrates yoga and evolution.

quotes.zh: 神圣生命是物质演化之顶点。
quotes.en: The divine life is the culmination of material evolution.

quotes.zh: 超心思——人类意识进化的下一阶段。
quotes.en: Supermind is the next stage of human evolution.

quotes.zh: 整体瑜伽——通向神圣生命的路径。
quotes.en: Integral yoga is the path to divine life.

quotes.zh: 显现(Shakti)与意识(Purusha)的合一。
quotes.en: Unity of Shakti and Purusha.

core_theses: 超心思是意识进化的下一阶段
counter_patterns: 超心思难以经验验证
整体瑜伽是东西方混合体
进化论与精神哲学的混合不严谨

bio_zh: 将吠檀多介绍到西方。
bio_en: Brought Vedanta to the West.

quotes.zh: 所有宗教都是真的——真理的多元表现。
quotes.en: All religions are true — plural manifestations of truth.
quotes.source_zh: 1893 芝加哥世界宗教大会演讲

quotes.zh: 起来,觉醒,坚持不懈地追求。
quotes.en: Arise, awake, and stop not till the goal is reached.

quotes.zh: 力量是生命,怯懦是死亡。
quotes.en: Strength is life; weakness is death.

quotes.zh: 印度教的灵魂容忍所有宗教。
quotes.en: The soul of Hinduism tolerates all religions.

quotes.zh: 瑜伽是抑制心的作用的修行。
quotes.en: Yoga is the practice of restraining the fluctuations of the mind.

core_theses: 所有宗教都是真的(多元)
胜王瑜伽/行动瑜伽/智瑜伽/信瑜伽
counter_patterns: 宗教多元论可能抹平差异
四种瑜伽的整合有简化
社会福音被批过于乐观

bio_zh: 儒家创始人。
bio_en: Founder of Confucianism.

quotes.zh: 学而时习之,不亦说乎?有朋自远方来,不亦乐乎?人不知而不愠,不亦君子乎?
quotes.en: To study and review timely — is that not delightful? To have friends come from afar — is that not happy? Not to be upset when not recognized — is that not the mark of a noble person?

quotes.zh: 己所不欲,勿施于人。
quotes.en: Do not do to others what you do not want done to yourself.

quotes.zh: 知之为知之,不知为不知,是知也。
quotes.en: To know what you know and what you do not know — that is knowledge.

quotes.zh: 唯仁者能好人,能恶人。
quotes.en: Only the humane person can truly love and truly hate.

quotes.zh: 君子和而不同,小人同而不和。
quotes.en: The noble person seeks harmony, not uniformity; the petty person seeks uniformity, not harmony.

counter_patterns: 仁不能解决制度问题
君子理想化难以普及
礼的等级制可能保守

bio_zh: 《道德经》作者(传)。
bio_en: Traditionally author of *Tao Te Ching*.

quotes.zh: 道可道,非常道。
quotes.en: The Tao that can be told is not the eternal Tao.

quotes.zh: 无为而无不为。
quotes.en: Act by not-acting; accomplish by letting go.

quotes.zh: 上善若水。
quotes.en: The highest good is like water.

quotes.zh: 反者道之动,弱者道之用。
quotes.en: Reversal is the movement of Tao; yielding is the use of Tao.

quotes.zh: 知其白,守其黑,为天下式。
quotes.en: Know the white, hold the black — be a model for the world.

counter_patterns: 无为容易被误解为不作为
道的概念过于模糊
反者道之动可能为倒退辩护

bio_zh: 《庄子》继承并发展老子思想。
bio_en: Continued and developed Laozi's thought.

quotes.zh: 吾生也有涯,而知也无涯。
quotes.en: Life is finite, but knowledge is boundless.

quotes.zh: 庄周梦为蝴蝶,醒而不知周之梦为蝴蝶与?蝴蝶之梦为周与?
quotes.en: Zhuangzi dreamt he was a butterfly. On waking, he did not know whether he was Zhuangzi who had dreamt he was a butterfly, or a butterfly dreaming he was Zhuangzi.

quotes.zh: 天地与我并生,而万物与我为一。
quotes.en: Heaven and earth are born with me; the ten thousand things are one with me.

quotes.zh: 至人无己,神人无功,圣人无名。
quotes.en: The perfect person has no self; the divine has no achievement; the sage has no name.

quotes.zh: 子非鱼,安知鱼之乐?——子非我,安知我不知鱼之乐?
quotes.en: You are not a fish — how do you know the joy of fish? — You are not me — how do you know I don't know?

core_theses: 吾生也有涯,而知也无涯
counter_patterns: 齐物论可能为相对主义
逍遥不能脱离现实
道术分裂的诊断有浪漫化

bio_zh: 性善论代表。
bio_en: Representative of the doctrine of original goodness.

quotes.zh: 人之初,性本善。
quotes.en: Man by nature is good.

quotes.zh: 恻隐之心,人皆有之。
quotes.en: The feeling of compassion is inherent in all humans.

quotes.zh: 穷则独善其身,达则兼善天下。
quotes.en: In poverty, cultivate your own virtue; in success, benefit the world.

quotes.zh: 天时不如地利,地利不如人和。
quotes.en: Heaven's timing is less important than terrain; terrain less than human unity.

quotes.zh: 富贵不能淫,贫贱不能移,威武不能屈。
quotes.en: Neither riches nor honors can corrupt him; neither poverty nor lowliness can shift him; neither threats nor violence can bend him.

core_theses: 穷则独善其身,达则兼善天下
counter_patterns: 性善论难以解释人性之恶
四端说需要进一步说明如何扩展
兼善天下的政治理想难以实现

bio_zh: 性恶论代表。
bio_en: Representative of the doctrine of original evil.

quotes.zh: 人之性恶,其善者伪也。
quotes.en: Human nature is evil; its goodness is the result of acquired effort.

quotes.zh: 学不可以已。
quotes.en: Learning must never cease.

quotes.zh: 制天命而用之。
quotes.en: Master Heaven and use it.

quotes.zh: 礼者,法之大分,类之纲纪也。
quotes.en: Ritual is the great differentiation of method, the organizing principle of categories.

quotes.zh: 积水成渊,蛟龙生焉。
quotes.en: Accumulated water becomes a deep pool; dragons arise from it.

counter_patterns: 性恶论难以解释道德起源
化性起伪过于依赖教化
天论有反神秘化倾向

bio_zh: 心学集大成者:致良知、知行合一。
bio_en: Master of mind-study: conscience, unity of knowledge and action.

quotes.zh: 知是行之始,行是知之成。
quotes.en: Knowledge is the beginning of action; action is the completion of knowledge.

quotes.zh: 致良知——把良知扩充到极致。
quotes.en: Extend conscience to its utmost.

quotes.zh: 心外无物,心外无理。
quotes.en: There is nothing and no principle outside the mind.

quotes.zh: 破山中贼易,破心中贼难。
quotes.en: It is easier to defeat the bandits in the mountain than the bandits in the heart.

quotes.zh: 未有知而不行者。知而不行,只是未知。
quotes.en: There is no real knowledge that is not practiced. Knowledge un-practiced is not real knowledge.

quotes.zh: 人皆可以为尧舜。
quotes.en: Anyone can become a sage like Yao or Shun.

counter_patterns: 致良知可能为独断辩护
心外无物难以解释客观世界
知行合一在实践中难以证伪

bio_zh: 禅宗六祖。'本来无一物'。
bio_en: Sixth Patriarch of Chan (Zen).

quotes.zh: 本来无一物,何处惹尘埃。
quotes.en: Originally there is not a single thing — where could dust alight?

quotes.zh: 菩提本无树,明镜亦非台。
quotes.en: The bodhi tree is not a tree; the bright mirror is not a stand.

quotes.zh: 不立文字,教外别传。
quotes.en: A special transmission outside the scriptures; not relying on words and letters.

quotes.zh: 佛法在世间,不离世间觉。
quotes.en: Buddha-dharma is in this world; awakening is not apart from it.

quotes.zh: 一灯能除千年暗,一智能灭万年愚。
quotes.en: One lamp can dispel a thousand years of darkness; one wisdom can extinguish ten thousand years of ignorance.

core_theses: 本来无一物,何处惹尘埃
菩提本无树,明镜亦非台
counter_patterns: 不立文字难以传承
顿悟可能忽视渐修
教外别传难以规范教团

bio_zh: 京都学派创始人。
bio_en: Founder of the Kyoto School.

quotes.zh: 纯粹经验是先于主客二分的。
quotes.en: Pure experience precedes the subject-object split.

quotes.zh: 场所是意识得以发生的逻辑基础。
quotes.en: 'Place' is the logical foundation where consciousness arises.

quotes.zh: 绝对无——自我与世界的真如。
quotes.en: Absolute nothingness — the true suchness of self and world.

quotes.zh: 宗教的世界观是矛盾的自觉。
quotes.en: The religious worldview is the self-consciousness of contradiction.

quotes.zh: "我"是世界的"场",世界是"我"的场。
quotes.en: The 'I' is the field of the world; the world is the field of the 'I'.

core_theses: 纯粹经验先于主客二分
counter_patterns: 场所逻辑过于形而上学
绝对无的禅学化失去哲学严格性
对西方哲学的吸收有简化

bio_zh: 亚里士多德主义综合者,东方哲学家。
bio_en: Synthesizer of Aristotelianism; Eastern philosopher.

quotes.zh: 存在的本质与存在的实存是不同的。
quotes.en: The essence of a thing is distinct from its existence.

quotes.zh: '漂浮的人'论证——自我意识不依赖身体。
quotes.en: The 'Floating Man' argument — self-awareness does not depend on the body.

quotes.zh: 必然的存在——其本质即是其存在。
quotes.en: The Necessary Existent — its essence is its existence.

quotes.zh: 逻辑是通向形而上学的工具,但非其方法。
quotes.en: Logic is the tool, not the method, of metaphysics.

quotes.zh: 先天的认识——理智先于物质而把握共相。
quotes.en: A priori knowledge — intellect grasps universals prior to matter.

core_theses: 存在的本质与存在不同
漂浮的人论证(自我不依赖身体)
counter_patterns: 形而上学分离难以证伪
理性论证不能达到神的全知
对亚里士多德的综合有简化
rebuttal_style: 亚里士多德综合 + 形而上学

bio_zh: 《哲学家的矛盾》批判哲学家的因果论;转向苏菲神秘主义。
bio_en: *Incoherence of the Philosophers* attacks philosophers' causal account; turned to Sufi mysticism.

quotes.zh: 因果律的怀疑——火不烧棉,因为神使它燃烧。
quotes.en: The denial of natural causation — fire does not burn cotton; God makes it burn.

quotes.zh: 知行合一——知识若不转化为行动是无用的。
quotes.en: Knowledge unaccompanied by action is useless.

quotes.zh: 怀疑作为方法——为的是超越怀疑。
quotes.en: Doubt as method — in order to transcend doubt.

quotes.zh: 哲学家的因果论是无根据的假设。
quotes.en: The philosophers' account of causation is unfounded assumption.

quotes.zh: 直觉的认知高于形式证明。
quotes.en: Intuitive knowledge is higher than formal proof.

core_theses: 因果律的怀疑(神使火燃烧)
哲学家的因果论是无根据的假设
直觉知识高于形式证明
counter_patterns: 怀疑因果可能为迷信开路
反哲学立场难以论证
神秘体验不能替代逻辑

bio_zh: 《基督教要义》归正宗神学体系。
bio_en: *Institutes of the Christian Religion* — Reformed systematic theology.

quotes.zh: 人的全然败坏——除了神的恩典,无法自救。
quotes.en: Total depravity — apart from grace, no self-salvation.

quotes.zh: 预定论——神在永恒中拣选。
quotes.en: Predestination — God's eternal election.

quotes.zh: 上帝的主权是绝对的。
quotes.en: The sovereignty of God is absolute.

quotes.zh: 我们的一切知识都必须为神而用。
quotes.en: All our knowledge must serve God.

counter_patterns: 预定论难以与道德责任相容
绝对主权可能为暴政辩护
全然败坏低估了恩典的效果
rebuttal_style: 归正宗神学 + 圣经注释

bio_zh: 《教会教义学》— 强调上帝之言的优先性。
bio_en: *Church Dogmatics* — the primacy of the Word of God.

quotes.zh: 上帝就是上帝——他与人的一切相对立。
quotes.en: God is God — wholly other than humans.

quotes.zh: 上帝的话即上帝。
quotes.en: The Word of God is God himself.

quotes.zh: 神学必须以神的话为出发点,非以人的经验。
quotes.en: Theology must start with God's Word, not human experience.

quotes.zh: 神在基督里向人说话。
quotes.en: God speaks to man in Christ.

core_theses: 上帝就是上帝(全然他者)
counter_patterns: 全然他者难以为道德提供基础
辩证神学过于学院化
对自然神学的拒绝可能切断桥梁
rebuttal_style: 辩证神学 + 圣经神学

bio_zh: 《狱中书简》— 论廉价恩典、宗教无宗教。
bio_en: *Letters and Papers from Prison* — costly grace, religionless Christianity.

quotes.zh: 廉价恩典是教会与世界最大的敌人。
quotes.en: Cheap grace is the mortal enemy of the church.

quotes.zh: 宗教无宗教——成熟的世俗性是信仰的标志。
quotes.en: Religionless Christianity — mature worldliness as a mark of faith.

quotes.zh: 上帝是我的同伴,而不是世界的旁观者。
quotes.en: God is alongside me, not a spectator.

quotes.zh: 当基督呼召一个人时,是要他来死。
quotes.en: When Christ calls a man, he bids him come and die.

core_theses: 廉价恩典是教会的敌人
宗教无宗教(成熟的世俗性)
当基督呼召人,是要他来死
counter_patterns: 宗教无宗教可能为世俗化开路
廉价恩典的指控可能过于严厉
殉道立场不能普及
rebuttal_style: 激进改教 + 监狱书信
